notes: Each year maps to a list of unique ticker symbols.
For 2001-2025, each list uses the last available snapshot found in that calendar year from hanshof/sp500_constituents on GitHub.
For 2026, the list uses the current constituents table from the Wikipedia page "List of S&P 500 companies" as fetched on 2026-06-26.
Ticker symbols are stored as they appear in the source data and may include historical formats such as dots or suffixes.

Validation warning: the third-party historical dataset appears to undercount some older yearly snapshots (for example, 2001 has 463 tickers instead of roughly 500), so treat the 2001-early-2010s range as provisional until we replace it with a more authoritative source.
